# Amsterdam Jets

> Private jet, helicopter, and empty-leg charter broker based in Amsterdam, the Netherlands. We arrange flights from Amsterdam Schiphol (AMS) and Rotterdam (RTM) to destinations across Europe, the Middle East, North Africa, the United States and the Caribbean.

## Contact
- Email: Amsterdamjets@gmail.com
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/message/Z6A6W7IAFVHAO1
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/amsterdamjets
- Website: https://amsterdamjet.com

## Services
- Bespoke private jet charter (operator-agnostic, global sourcing from 10,000+ aircraft)
- Empty-leg flights at discounted rates (typically 40–70% off retail)
- Helicopter charter across Europe (transport, leisure, real-estate showings, events)
- Concierge & family-office charter desk
- Corporate flyer programs (roadshows, M&A, board movements)
- Add-ons: ground transport, in-flight catering, pet travel, villa/hotel bookings, yacht charter, wine tours

## Popular routes from Amsterdam
- Amsterdam to London — ~1h 05m, from €8,500 (light jet)
- Amsterdam to Paris — ~55m, from €7,900
- Amsterdam to Milan — ~1h 35m, from €12,500
- Amsterdam to Mallorca — ~2h 40m, from €16,000
- Amsterdam to Marbella (Málaga) — ~3h 10m, from €18,500
- Amsterdam to Marrakech / North Africa — ~3h 45m, from €22,000
- Amsterdam to Dubai — ~6h 30m, from €55,000
- Amsterdam to Abu Dhabi — ~6h 45m, from €57,000
- Amsterdam to New York (Teterboro) — ~7h 45m, from €72,000
- Amsterdam to the Caribbean — ~9h 30m (tech stop)

## About
Amsterdam Jets is operator-agnostic: we source the right aircraft for each flight rather than pushing a fixed fleet. Operators are vetted to Wyvern and ARGUS standards. Quotes are typically returned within the hour, and aircraft can be sourced and airborne in as little as two hours from confirmation.
